message:
feat: session entry ID cache toggle, model serde stability fix, and RPC alias tests

**session.rs**: Add PI_SESSION_ENTRY_ID_CACHE env var toggle (default:
enabled) for the HashSet-based entry ID cache. When disabled, falls back
to linear scan for environments where cache coherency with external
session mutations is a concern. Uses OnceLock for one-time env parsing.

**model.rs**: Fix proptest serde round-trip assertion to test canonical
stability (two-cycle round-trip) instead of one-cycle equality, since
Option<Value> fields may normalize between null and omitted forms across
a single serialize/deserialize cycle.

**tests/rpc_edge_cases.rs**: Add tests for RPC command type alias
normalization:
- rpc_follow_up_aliases_missing_message_return_error: Verifies follow-up,
  queue-follow-up, and followUp all route to the follow_up handler
- rpc_kebab_and_camel_aliases_dispatch_to_canonical_commands: Tests the
  full set of kebab-case and camelCase aliases for get-state, set-model,
  and other command families

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
